texto: Through photography and image I have been afforded the privilege of sharing the stories and myths of people's lives with others. The process for me became self-revelatory. It was a process of soul-making, something all humans are engaged in, no matter their endeavor. I saw a part of myself in each person I photographed. I came to realize, through the alchemical process of living, that each life is important, no matter how little that life seems to offer.
explicacao: Citação de J. Don Cook sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Through photography and image I have been afforded the privilege of sharing the stories and myths…” articula vida, humanity, photography em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como termino e vida.
